headline: Vena says UP, NS have capacity to handle merger-related growth
summary: Union Pacific CEO Jim Vena said his railroad will have capacity to manage growth from the proposed merger with Norfolk Southern, since UP has slashed the number of trains it operates on its system by 24% since 2019. The post Vena says UP, NS have capacity to handle merger-related growth appeared first on FreightWaves.
